reviews.review_description:
like spike email and the other 2d oculus apps no real apps on the oculus but a webbrowser to the sellers web

like spike email you have to register by email and for more sheet to pay see first the website of it

so the data is not store on your oculus or oculus cloud system but a private server from the seller

I was hesitant at first, but I am really impressed with the Oculus experience using Smartsheet.

Being able to take my headset anywhere and get my work done, while using a relatively larger screen compared to my laptop, is a game changer!

Paired my Bluetooth keyboard and mouse and it feels like I’m in a bigger version of my set up at home. Can’t wait to see where they take this next!
Shady move. I don't trust such a product / company

It does work.. however I cannot figure out how to scroll horizontally. Also scrolling vertically requires using the trigger on the scroll bar. In VR we have a grip button, and it would feel great to be able to scroll anywhere using that button. Also logging in is extremely difficult if you have SSO as you have to go in and out of VR to pull codes from your phone.

All in all of you have a basic smartsheet then this could work. Anything more advanced though and it won't. It's cool to see companies trying to make it work but it feels like a cheap port instead of a well thought out attempt

reviews.review_title: Excited to see this on Oculus
reviews.review_description: Smartsheet 2D is a great first step. Looking forward to the work apps built for Oculus.
Lot of potential to leverage unlimited screen size. Would love to see what they can do with 3D in future.
as a smartsheet power user I have to admit the combination of the app in the virtual reality is just amazing.

reviews.review_title: Taking work to the next level.
reviews.review_description: I"ve be an avid Smartsheet user for several years.  The platform has revolutionized how we work.  My first impression of the Oculus experience is very positive.  The possibilities are work how this can change the work environment are endless.
